name: Esports Entertainment Group Inc. 10.0% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Convertible Preferred Stock
summary: Esports Entertainment Group Inc. 10.0% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Convertible Preferred Stock is a series of preferred stock issued by Esports Entertainment Group, a company focused on esports wagering and entertainment. The preferred stock offers a fixed dividend rate and potential conversion into common stock. The company is headquartered in Hoboken, New Jersey.
